creator: wollman@khavrinen.lcs.mit.edu
text:
If I log in on ttyv0 and then log out again, I lose my getty.

	It still appears to be there, viz:

0 148 1  0  3  0  152 516 ttyin  Is   ??   0:00.08 /usr/libexec/getty Pc ttyv0 

	but I am unable to get it to listen to my pounding on the keyboard.

Fix: 

Ask Bruce, since he was the last one to touch it.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Log in, then log out again.
